response:
{
            "$return": "Daily return of the stock on that day.",
            "$volume": "Volume of the stock on that day.",
            "ZSCORE(A)": "Z-score of each element in the cross-sectional dimension of A.",

parsed.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day.
parsed.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day.
parsed.ZSCORE(A): Z-score of each element in the cross-sectional dimension of A.
parsed.TS_MEAN(A, n): Mean value of sequence A over the past n days.
parsed.TS_PCTCHANGE(A, p): Percentage change in the value of sequence A over p periods.
